query:
-- 更新所有外箱的CBM（0.1-1.3 m³）、毛重（22-29 kg）、净重（毛重-1到3kg）
UPDATE package_boxes 
SET cbm = ROUND(0.1 + (RAND() * 1.2), 6),
    grossWeight = ROUND(22 + (RAND() * 7), 2),
    netWeight = ROUND(22 + (RAND() * 7) - (1 + RAND() * 2), 2);
command:
